### Checklist
- [ ] HTML is semantic and well-structured
- [ ] CSS uses project variables (no hardcoded colors)
- [ ] Responsive at mobile, tablet, desktop
- [ ] No console errors
- [ ] Commits follow `type(scope): message` convention
- [ ] Branch is up to date with `develop`
